description: Signal registry for devils-council bench persona triggers. Each signal is a structural pattern the Phase 6 classifier detects in an artifact. Personas reference signals by ID in their frontmatter `triggers:` list. Phase 2 ships the registry shape and seeds the enumeration; Phase 6 implements detection in lib/classify.js.

auth_code_change.description: New or modified authentication / session / token-handling code.
auth_code_change.detection_hint: Filename patterns auth*, session*, login*, jwt*; imports of bcrypt/jose/jsonwebtoken/passport; endpoint paths like /login, /auth, /oauth.

crypto_import.description: Import of cryptographic primitives or random-number generation.
crypto_import.detection_hint: Imports of crypto, node:crypto, webcrypto, libsodium, openssl, bcrypt, argon2; use of Math.random() in security-adjacent paths.

secret_handling.description: New secret material flow - env-var reads, secret-manager fetches, KMS calls.
secret_handling.detection_hint: process.env.*_SECRET, *_KEY, *_TOKEN reads; AWS Secrets Manager / KMS / GCP Secret Manager API calls; .env file edits.

dependency_update.description: Changes to lockfile or package.json / requirements.txt / go.sum that add or upgrade dependencies.
dependency_update.detection_hint: Diff touches package-lock.json, yarn.lock, pnpm-lock.yaml, Pipfile.lock, go.sum, Cargo.lock, requirements.txt, or package.json dependencies/devDependencies blocks.

aws_sdk_import.description: New use of an AWS SDK client that typically implies new cloud resources or API calls.
aws_sdk_import.detection_hint: Imports from @aws-sdk/client-*, aws-sdk, boto3; new CDK/CloudFormation/Terraform resource definitions.

new_cloud_resource.detection_hint: New Terraform resource blocks, CDK Construct instantiations, CloudFormation resources, Pulumi resources. Excludes output/data lookups.

autoscaling_change.description: Changes to autoscaling / replica counts / HPA / batch concurrency.
autoscaling_change.detection_hint: Kubernetes HPA manifests, replica count edits, AWS ASG / AppAutoScaling configs, batch job concurrency parameters.

storage_class_change.description: Changes to storage class, retention, or tiering.
storage_class_change.detection_hint: S3 StorageClass, GCS storageClass, PersistentVolume storageClassName, bucket lifecycle policies.

network_egress.description: New outbound network call to an external service.
network_egress.detection_hint: fetch/axios/requests to non-loopback hostnames; new outbound NetworkPolicy allowances; egress gateway changes; telemetry/analytics SDK inits.

external_image_pull.description: New container image pulled from an external registry.
external_image_pull.detection_hint: Dockerfile FROM statements; Kubernetes Pod image: fields; values.yaml image.repository entries pointing outside the org registry.

unpinned_dependency.description: Dependency without a pinned version or digest.
unpinned_dependency.detection_hint: package.json/requirements.txt entries with ranges (^, ~, >=) where exact pins are expected; container image tags like `latest` or unversioned.

license_phone_home.description: Runtime behavior that contacts an external license / telemetry / analytics service.
license_phone_home.detection_hint: Sentry/Datadog/Mixpanel/Amplitude SDK initialization; license-server URL constants; telemetry opt-out gates.

helm_values_change.description: Changes to Helm chart values or values.yaml surface.
helm_values_change.detection_hint: Diff touches values.yaml, values.schema.json, or templates that reference .Values.*.

chart_yaml_present.description: Artifact contains or modifies a Helm Chart.yaml.
chart_yaml_present.detection_hint: File named Chart.yaml anywhere in the artifact path.

kots_config_change.description: Changes to Replicated KOTS config / kots-app.yaml / kots-kinds.
kots_config_change.detection_hint: Files matching kots-*.yaml, manifests/*.yaml with kind: Config / kind: Application (kots.io).

saas_only_assumption.description: Code that assumes multi-tenant SaaS context (shared control plane, multi-tenant DB, org-level routing).
saas_only_assumption.detection_hint: Tenant-ID routing logic added without a single-tenant mode; references to shared infra by hostname; org-scoped feature flags.
